operational_knowledge_units.title: OPTISweep uses EntityLogs database for logging
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that Fortna’s WCS creates several databases by default at install time, and that OPTISweep utilizes entity logs for logging.
observed_evidence: Visible text: 'At install Fortna’s WCS creates several databases as default. OPTISweep only utilizes entity logs for logging.'
